---
applyTo:
  - "**/*.proto"
  - "**/*.graphql"
  - "**/*.avro"
  - "**/*.thrift"
  - "**/openapi.yaml"
  - "**/swagger.yaml"
  - "**/schema.json"
  - "**/schema.sql"
---
# Schema Principles

- SCHEMA-BACKWARDS-COMPATIBLE: Never remove or rename fields in a released schema; deprecate and version instead.
- SCHEMA-EXPLICIT-TYPES: Every field must have an explicit type; avoid dynamic or untyped fields that shift validation to runtime.
- SCHEMA-DOCUMENT-FIELDS: Every field must have a description explaining its semantics, constraints, and unit where applicable.
- SCHEMA-DESIGN-FOR-EVOLUTION: Add new optional fields rather than changing existing ones; plan for consumers that ignore unknown fields.
- SCHEMA-VALIDATE-ON-INGESTION: Validate messages or documents against the schema at ingestion boundaries; reject and report invalid input immediately.
